prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, construct variants of L,D-transpeptidase 2 (LdtMt2) (bacterial transpeptidase (beta-lactam resistance)) from Mycobacterium tuberculosis with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. detail a computational workflow covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using AlphaFold2, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
